faq.q: How many GCC centers does AppDirect operate in India?
faq.a: AppDirect operates 1 active Global Capability Center site in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does AppDirect have GCC centers in?
faq.a: AppDirect's India GCC presence is in Pune.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does AppDirect run in India?
faq.a: AppDirect runs CoE centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at AppDirect's India GCCs?
faq.a: AppDirect's India centers employ in the 101 to 200 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads AppDirect's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 3 leaders at AppDirect's India centers, across IT and HR. Names and contact details open with a free account.
